item.title: Fender Pawn Shop Reverse Jaguar Bass 2012 - Red — $1,000
item.description:
$1,000 · Very Good · Aidan's Shop

For sale is a Fender Pawn Shop Reverse Jaguar Bass in great shape. Bass does have one minor ding on lower side body (see pIcs).

Cont. US shipping Only.
-see below for model details.

Fender Pawn Shop Series introduces the greatest guitars that never were

When you pick up a Pawn Shop Reverse Jaguar Bass, you're holding one of the most original instruments Fender never made. Part of Fender's fun and creative Pawn Shop Series, the Pawn Shop Reverse Jaguar Bass captures the spirit of the mid '60s trough the mid '70s, back when Fender began experimenting with alternative designs. Many of these truly unique instruments somehow found their way out into the real world, in time becoming the kind of rare treasures you might be lucky enough to find squirreled away in the back of a pawn shop.

Reverse Jaguar humbucking pickups deliver classic '70s growling bass

Armed with a pair of Fender's special Reverse Jaguar humbuckers, the Pawn Shop Reverse Jaguar Bass gives you growling, harmonically complex tones. These massy, oversized pickups provide you with plenty of output, giving the Pawn Shop Reverse Jaguar Bass a slightly more aggressive feel. Simple controls (just a master volume, master tone, and 3-way toggle switch) also make dialing in the perfect tone easy, without overwhelming you with options.

Custom hardware and appointments provide extra Pawn Shop flare

Beyond its electronics and nearly unprecedented reverse body/headstock, the Pawn Shop Reverse Jaguar Bass provides you with several other cool Pawn Shop Series perks. First among these is the Pawn Shop Reverse Jaguar Bass's High Mass Modern Bridge, which gives you enhanced sustain and impressively solid feel. The Pawn Shop Reverse Jaguar also features a custom pickguard, plus vintage '70s tuners that look great and provide you with rock-solid tuning.

Fender Pawn Shop Reverse Jaguar Bass 4-string Solidbody Electric Bass Guitar Features:

  • A truly unique solidbody bass that captures the creative spirit of Fender's innovative history
  • Reverse Jaguar body and headstock give you a cool custom look
  • 2 x Reverse Jaguar humbucking pickups provide deep and rich bass sound with plenty of growl and thump
  • Simple controls make dialing in the perfect tone easy
  • High Mass Modern Bridge gives you enhanced sustain and string response
  • Vintage '70s tuners look great and provide you with rock-solid tuning

item.title: Squier By Fender Katana Bass - 1985 - MIJ - Fujigen A0 Serial - Black - Flying V - 32" Medium Scale - Vintage 4-String Bass — $1,499
item.description:
$1,499 · Good · Eccentric Guitars

The Katana Bass was designed during Fenders more experimental days in the mid-80s, with an extremely unusual shape and overall build by there standards, which makes them incredibly unique and rare.

Built in Japan by Fujigen for a single year from mid-1985 to mid-1986. it featured an asymmetrical Flying V shape, 32" medium scale, set-neck, passive electronics, a lone Precision pickup and a Squier logo that was unique to it.

The condition of this one is good, it has its fair share of bumps and scratches particularly along the edges of the body, which is very typical for this style and age. But overall it has a very nice look to it, and is one of the cleaner I've come across and is also entirely original.

The playability as expected of a Fujigen bass, is extremely good. The neck is straight, the frets are in good condition, and the action gets very low and is currently around 2.0mm making it a breeze to play. It weighs in at a very comfortable 7.4Ib with a surprisingly good balance.

The tone is of course similar to a P-bass, yet it has a unique midrange growl to it which may surprise you and makes it stand out a bit better in the mix.

This is a very rare and unique vintage Squier which I couldn't pass up when I had the chance to grab it, and it definitely lived up to my expectations. I feel like most odd 80s basses like these often don't stand up to the quality and playability you'd want for the prices they go for, but Japanese made basses simply never disappoint.

item.title: Vintage 1981 Fender USA Jazz Bass - Ash Sunburst Body!!! — $1,281
item.description:
$1,281 · Good · Walters Leftovers

For sale is my beautiful 1981 Fender USA *loaded* Jazz Bass Body.

I included some pics with the neck on there just so you can see how great it looks.

The sale includes:

- Original 1981 Sunburst Jazz Bass body (February 5, 1981)

- All original pickups / pick guard, hardware

From my knowledge, the only non-original parts are:

- Replaced Knobs

- One replaced (vintage) pick-up cover


In overall good vintage condition with normal cosmetic wear.

Features a beautiful Sunburst finish that looks deep brown under sunlight and shows the beautiful Swamp Ash wood grain.

This was converted to a 4-Bolt neck long before I owned it. A very common mod for CBS 3-bolt instruments as it improves neck stability.


Loaded body weighs approximately 7.8 lbs. With the neck on, the bass weighs just under 10lbs.


Will be safely packed and shipped!


Feel free to ask questions and,

Thanks for looking!

item.title: Ibanez SR405QM-CNB Soundgear Standard Bass 2007 - 2015 - Charcoal Brown — $379.99
item.description:
$379.99 · Excellent · Rhythmic Restorations

Ibanez SR405QM Soundgear 5-String Bass

The Ibanez SR405QM combines sleek Soundgear comfort, versatile electronics, and eye-catching looks into a professional-grade 5-string bass that's ready for the stage or studio. Featuring a stunning quilted maple top over a lightweight mahogany body, the SR405QM delivers modern style while maintaining the fast, comfortable feel that has made the Soundgear series a favorite among bass players worldwide.

Its slim 5-piece maple/rosewood neck and 24-fret fingerboard provide effortless playability, while dual humbucking pickups and an active 3-band EQ offer a wide range of tones—from deep, punchy lows to articulate highs. The Accu-cast bridge ensures excellent sustain, tuning stability, and precise intonation across all five strings.

Features:

  • 5-string Soundgear design
  • Quilted maple top with mahogany body
  • Slim 5-piece maple/rosewood neck
  • 24 medium frets
  • Dual humbucking pickups
  • Active 3-band EQ for extensive tonal shaping
  • Accu-cast bridge for improved sustain and intonation
  • Lightweight, ergonomic body design
  • 34" scale length
  • Cosmo Black hardware

Whether you're laying down solid low-end in a worship band, covering modern rock, country, metal, or jazz gigs, the SR405QM delivers the comfort, versatility, and extended range serious bass players demand.

item.title: 2004 Rickenbacker 4003 Turquoise Rare Color OHSC Paperwork All Original — $3,499
item.description:
$3,499 · Very Good · Guitar Chimp

For Sale: 2004 Rickenbacker 4003 Turquoise w/ OHSC & Paperwork | Rare Color | All Original

Up for sale is a 2004 Rickenbacker 4003 in the exceptionally rare Turquoise finish, complete with its original Rickenbacker hard-shell case and original paperwork.

Turquoise is one of the most desirable and hardest-to-find custom colors Rickenbacker has ever produced. Offered for only a short period, it has become one of the most collectible finishes among modern Rickenbacker enthusiasts. The vibrant gloss Turquoise finish perfectly complements the classic 4003 design, giving this bass an unmistakable look while retaining the legendary tone and feel that have made Rickenbackers famous for decades.

This is a completely original example that has clearly been well cared for and includes the original paperwork—a nice bonus for collectors.

Condition

Very Good – 8.5/10

  • Light scratches throughout
  • Some small dings from normal use
  • Minor clear coat bubbling around the lower side of the bridge

The finish bubbling is cosmetic only and is a fairly common occurrence on Rickenbacker basses of this era. It does not affect playability or structural integrity.

Please review all photos carefully for the most accurate representation of condition.

The bass is 100% original with no cracks, breaks, repairs, or structural issues.

The neck is straight, the original frets are in excellent condition with minimal wear, and the bass has been professionally set up by our in-house luthier. It plays cleanly up and down the neck with no buzzing or dead spots.

The original Rickenbacker hard-shell case and original paperwork are included.

Specifications

  • Model: Rickenbacker 4003
  • Year: 2004
  • Serial Number: 12 34649
  • Finish: Turquoise
  • Body: Solid Maple
  • Neck: Maple Neck-Through Construction
  • Fingerboard: Rosewood
  • Radius: 10"
  • Inlays: Pearloid Triangle
  • Scale Length: 33.25"
  • Frets: 20
  • Nut Width: 1.71"
  • Neck Depth: .93" at the 1st Fret
  • Neck Depth: .97" at the 12th Fret
  • Pickups: Dual Original Rickenbacker Hi-Gain Single-Coils
  • Controls: Volume, Volume, Tone, Tone
  • Switching: 3-Way Pickup Selector
  • Outputs: Standard Mono & Ric-O-Sound Stereo
  • Bridge: Original RIC Bridge/Tailpiece
  • Tuners: Schaller Deluxe
  • Weight: 9 lbs 8 oz
  • Case: Original Rickenbacker Hard-Shell Case
  • Paperwork: Included

Electronics & Features

The 4003 remains one of the most recognizable basses ever built thanks to its neck-through maple construction, unmistakable styling, and signature Rickenbacker sound.

The dual Hi-Gain pickups deliver the aggressive attack, piano-like clarity, and growling midrange that have made the 4003 a favorite among rock, progressive, alternative, and classic players for decades.

The Ric-O-Sound stereo output is another hallmark feature, allowing each pickup to be sent independently to separate amplifiers or effects chains for enormous tonal flexibility.

Of course, what truly sets this bass apart is its beautiful Turquoise finish. Rarely seen on the used market, it immediately stands out from the more common Fireglo, Jetglo, and Mapleglo finishes and has become one of the most collectible modern Rickenbacker colors.

Tone & Feel

This bass has the unmistakable Rickenbacker voice—tight lows, articulate mids, brilliant highs, and the famous "Rick growl" that cuts effortlessly through a mix.

The neck-through maple construction provides exceptional sustain and note definition, while the rosewood fingerboard adds warmth and balance to the overall response.

The neck has a comfortable medium profile that feels substantial without being bulky, making it equally enjoyable for fingerstyle or pick playing.

At 9 lbs 8 oz, it has the solid, substantial feel players expect from a classic 4003 while remaining well balanced on a strap.

Transparency & Photos

As with all Guitar Chimp listings, detailed photos are provided of the actual instrument. At the end of the photo set, you'll find close-up images taken under direct lighting to highlight any cosmetic wear.

We don't just describe the condition—we show it in detail so there are no surprises.

Many customers tell us our instruments often arrive in better condition than expected.

Why Buy From Guitar Chimp?

With over 18 years of experience, Guitar Chimp is trusted by players and collectors worldwide for high-quality, player-ready instruments.

Every bass is thoroughly inspected and professionally set up by our in-house luthier.

We are experts at shipping and have safely shipped thousands of guitars and basses all over the world. Every instrument is professionally packed, fully insured, and shipped with signature confirmation.

item.title: 2012 Rickenbacker 4003 Ruby Red Rare Color OHSC All Original — $2,499
item.description:
$2,499 · Very Good · Guitar Chimp

For Sale: 2012 Rickenbacker 4003 Ruby Red w/ OHSC | Rare Color | All Original

Up for sale is a 2012 Rickenbacker 4003 in the extremely rare Ruby Red finish, complete with its original Rickenbacker hard-shell case.

Ruby Red is one of the hardest-to-find modern Rickenbacker colors and is seldom seen on the used market. The deep transparent red finish beautifully showcases the maple body underneath while retaining the unmistakable look of a classic 4003. Combined with the neck-through construction, rosewood fingerboard, Hi-Gain pickups, and Ric-O-Sound stereo capability, this is a fantastic example of one of Rickenbacker's most iconic basses.

If you've been looking for something beyond the typical Fireglo, Jetglo, or Mapleglo, this Ruby Red is a standout.

Condition

Very Good – 8/10

  • Light scratches throughout
  • Some dings from normal use
  • A few dings on the headstock
  • Tarnish to the hardware
  • Some clear coat bubbling around the lower side of the bridge and around the bridge pickup surround

The finish bubbling is cosmetic only and is a fairly common occurrence on Rickenbacker basses of this era. It does not affect playability or structural integrity.

Please review all photos carefully for the most accurate representation of condition.

The bass is 100% original with no cracks, breaks, repairs, or structural issues.

The neck is straight, the frets are in excellent condition with minimal wear, and the bass has been professionally set up by our in-house luthier. It plays cleanly up and down the neck with no buzzing or dead spots.

The original Rickenbacker hard-shell case is included. The case shows some cosmetic wear from normal use but remains fully functional.

Please note that the original paperwork is not included.

Specifications

  • Model: Rickenbacker 4003
  • Year: 2012
  • Serial Number: 12 34649
  • Finish: Ruby Red
  • Body: Solid Maple
  • Neck: Maple/Walnut Neck-Through Construction
  • Fingerboard: Rosewood
  • Radius: 10"
  • Inlays: Pearloid Triangle
  • Scale Length: 33.25"
  • Frets: 20
  • Nut Width: 1.70"
  • Neck Depth: .89" at the 1st Fret
  • Neck Depth: .91" at the 12th Fret
  • Pickups: Dual Original Rickenbacker Hi-Gain Single-Coils
  • Controls: Volume, Volume, Tone, Tone
  • Switching: 3-Way Pickup Selector
  • Outputs: Standard Mono & Ric-O-Sound Stereo
  • Bridge: Original Rickenbacker Bridge/Tailpiece
  • Tuners: Schaller Deluxe
  • Weight: 9 lbs 4 oz
  • Case: Original Rickenbacker Hard-Shell Case

Electronics & Features

The 4003 has long been celebrated for its unmistakable sound and construction. Its neck-through maple design produces exceptional sustain and clarity, while the dual Hi-Gain pickups deliver the aggressive attack, punch, and articulate midrange that have made Rickenbackers favorites of countless professional bassists.

The Ric-O-Sound stereo output allows players to send each pickup to separate amplifiers or effects chains, opening up a wide range of creative possibilities, while the standard mono output retains the classic 4003 simplicity.

Of course, the real highlight of this bass is the stunning Ruby Red finish. It has tremendous depth and richness, allowing the natural maple grain to subtly show through while giving the instrument an elegant appearance that is rarely encountered.

Tone & Feel

This bass has everything players expect from a great Rickenbacker.

The maple construction provides incredible note definition, ringing sustain, and piano-like clarity, while the Hi-Gain pickups deliver the signature growl and punch that easily cuts through any mix.

The medium neck profile feels comfortable and substantial without being bulky, making long playing sessions effortless.

At 9 lbs 4 oz, it has the solid feel players expect from a traditional 4003 while remaining well balanced on a strap.

Transparency & Photos

item.title: Ibanez GSR200-MB Gio Soundgear 2000 - 2003 - Metallic Blue — $215
item.description:
$215 · Very Good · Rhythmic Restorations

Ibanez Soundgear GSR200 4-String Bass Guitar

The Ibanez GSR200 is one of the most popular entry-level basses on the market, offering exceptional comfort, versatile tone, and legendary Ibanez playability at an affordable price. Designed with a lightweight body and slim GSR4 maple neck, the GSR200 makes long practice sessions and live performances effortless for players of all skill levels.

Equipped with a versatile Dynamix P/J pickup configuration, the GSR200 delivers everything from warm, punchy vintage bass tones to modern, articulate sounds. The onboard Phat II active bass boost adds extra low-end power when you need it, making this bass equally at home in rock, country, blues, worship, and metal settings. Its 34" scale length, comfortable neck profile, and dependable hardware provide excellent tuning stability and consistent performance. (ibanez.com)

Features:

  • Lightweight Soundgear body design
  • Slim GSR4 maple neck for fast, comfortable playability
  • Dynamix P neck pickup and J bridge pickup
  • Phat II active bass boost circuit
  • 34" scale length
  • 22 medium frets
  • Fully adjustable B10 bridge
  • Chrome hardware

Whether you're picking up bass for the first time or need a reliable instrument for rehearsals and gigs, the Ibanez GSR200 delivers impressive tone, comfort, and value that punches well above its price point.

item.title: ESP FOREST 2008 - BLACK — $2,134.85
item.description:

For sale: 2008 ESP Forest bass, freshly turned 18!

Despite her age, she’s in good condition for nearly 20 years old, fully functional and ready to make some noise.
Everything is original: pickups, hardware, preamp, etc.

This is a relatively rare neck-through model, especially without any chips — quite exceptional given its sharp body shape (she’s clearly been well taken care of).

A few “youth memories” to mention:

  • Belt scratches on the back
  • A small scratch on the tip of the headstock
  • A slight finish flaw (about 2 mm) on the back of the neck (not noticeable to the touch)
  • Some light oxidation on the hardware
  • A small mark near the bridge, where the low E string is inserted

No chips to report — and that’s not something every Forest can claim!

Comes with its original ESP case and fret protector.

Bass is ready to play, no additional work needed.
Shipping available.

Musically 🎸

item.title: Fender Fullerton Precision Bass Elec.Uke, Elec.Uke, Walnut Fingerboard, Tortoiseshell Pickguard, White — $359.99
item.description:
$359.99 · Brand New · Haight Ashbury Music Center

Fender Fullerton Precision Bass Elec.Uke, Elec.Uke, Walnut Fingerboard, Tortoiseshell Pickguard, White

Description

A celebration of Fender's pioneering electric bass design in a refreshingly fun size, the Fullerton Precision Bass® ukulele is nothing short of electric. Uniquely portable and performance-ready, the Precision Bass ukulele features an approachable 20.25" scale length, compact proportions and surprising lightness, making it remarkably easy to pick up and impossible to put down. With a built-in tuner for on-the-fly adjustment and intuitive controls for volume and tone, the on-board preamp packs an articulate low-end and big tonal personality that punches far above its weight. Offered in classic Fender colors with a signature Precision Bass pickguard and headstock shape, this bass is ready to lay the foundation for any player at any stage.

Features

  • Precision Bass body shape
  • 4-in-line Precision Bass headstock
  • Fender-designed preamp system
  • No-tie bridge
  • Chrome hardware

item.title: Squier Affinity Jaguar Bass Humbucker BLK — $314.99
item.description:
$314.99 · Brand New · Brothers Guitar Shop

Some basses just get the job done. Others make you wonder how they're selling for this price. The Squier Affinity Jaguar Bass H is definitely the latter. As a Fender dealer, we've always been impressed by how much value Squier packs into the Affinity Series, and this Jaguar Bass is one of the best examples. It's lightweight, comfortable, sounds huge, and is the kind of bass you can hand to a beginner or take straight to a gig without feeling like you're making a compromise.

Finished in classic Black, the Jaguar Bass H combines Fender's iconic offset styling with a straightforward, no-nonsense design that's all about great tone and effortless playability. The single ceramic humbucker delivers thick, punchy low end with plenty of clarity and attack, making it equally at home playing rock, punk, indie, pop, country, or worship. Roll back the tone for warm vintage character or open it up for modern punch that cuts through any mix.

One of this model's biggest advantages is its 32-inch medium scale, offering the perfect balance between a traditional long-scale bass and a short-scale instrument. It feels familiar to experienced bassists while being noticeably easier on the hands, making stretches, fast runs, and long gigs more comfortable. Combined with the slim "C"-shaped maple neck and lightweight poplar body, it's an instrument you'll want to keep picking up.

Whether you're buying your first bass, adding a reliable backup to your collection, or looking for an affordable instrument that performs well above its price point, the Affinity Jaguar Bass H continues to be one of the smartest values in the Fender lineup.

Specifications

  • Finish: Black
  • Body: Poplar
  • Body Shape: Jaguar Bass
  • Scale Length: 32" (Medium Scale)
  • Neck: Maple

  • Neck Finish: Satin Urethane

item.title: Lakland 44-02 Fretless Bass + Lakland fretted Neck RARE 2004 - Natural — $1,949
item.description:
$1,949 · Excellent · Peter B.

Early Korean run Lakland Skyline 44-02 Fretless with additional OEM Fretted neck (2 necks)

Got this in 2 separate buys. As a 4 string fretless Lakland Skyline is virtually unobtanium, when I came a cross an OEM Lakland fretless neck from another TB’er, I grabbed it to add to my own 44-02. Since I put the fretless neck on , it hasn’t come off. TOO MUCH FUN. Setup is perfection with Elixir’s 45-105’s

Think Pino MM but with a Jazz pickup and three bands. I currently have the mid dip switch set to 250k as i like the mid/bass tone more than the usually chosen 500K. 

Bass is in excellent shape as pics will show. Control cavity has been grounded and isolated with copper foil.

Specs:

- Ash Body
- Maple Neck ( both ) 
- Maple Fingerboard ( both) 
- Fretless neck - Lined no top markers 
- Fretted neck - Abalone decals over black dots ( top and side) 
- OEM Hipshot ultralite tuners on both necks (polished chrome on fretless, satin silver on OEM ) 
- Bartolini Pre & pickups ( US Versions installed on Skyline's) 

- Dunlop Dual Strap lock Buttons
- 8.4 lbs with fretless neck
- Comes well packed in D. Lakin Red gig bag thats missing 1 shoulder strap. 
- FREE SHIP CONUS

The bass absolutely sings. Mwah, and bloom, with a very thin neck front to back. Far different than the 5 string. Extremely comfortable with all the flexibility that comes with this Bart setup. 

With the OEM fretted neck it’s a standard killin’ Lakland in the rare Ash/Maple/Bart config. Slap monster MM tone and J bass tone. 

Will ship with the preferred neck installed. Buyers choice. Fretless neck bolt pattern copied from OEM neck, so swap is simple and quick. 

PM if interested - No trades please.

item.title: Steinberger Synapse 4 XS-1FPA Mid 2000s - Matte Black — $925
item.description:
$925 · Very Good · Lucas 's Gear Shop

Steinberger Synapse Bass in very good condition. Plays and sounds great.

Comes with new strings, gig bag and original tool set and manual.


More info:

Designed by Ned Steinberger himself, the Synapse XS-1FPA Bass Guitar features the unique U-channel graphite core in a rock maple neck and maple body. Combo head accommodates double-ball and single-ball strings while the unique direct-drive double-ball bridge adds super-fast string changes and tune-it-once tuning stability.


While other guitar manufacturers have been resting on their laurels, Steinberger's been thinking. Witness the XS-1FPA bass's strap hook, recessed tool holder and output jack, fold-down leg rest, and phenolic fingerboard that's slick as butter and fast as lightning.


Low-impedance EMG USA bass pickup with internal low-impedance preamp and piezo bridge extends the range on both ends for earth-moving lows and phenomenal transients from slap-style playing.

Features

Cybrosonic Technology featuring an integrated graphite U-channel combined with a three-piece hard maple neck

Maple wings

Phenolic fingerboard

EMG USA humbucker

Piezo bridge

Ebony saddle

Direct-drive double-ball bridge

Fold-down leg rest

Recessed tool holder

Recessed output jack

Strap hook

Combo headpiece

34" scale

Takes single- or double-ball strings

item.title: 1981 Aria Pro II SB R-60 PR — $750
item.description:
$750 · Fair · Nick K's Bass Gear

Awesome players bass from 1981. I love this bass and played it a lot in my 80s band but forced to sell for financial reasons.
Anyone who knows Aria basses knows that the original pickups go bad at the absolute worst time. This has had a new Kent Armstrong dual coil pickup installed with new wiring and new Dunlop strap locks. So this bass has the SB700/1000 style pickup with the more familiar 19mm P bass spacing, its like the best of both worlds. Really sounds incredible and its ready to go for another 40 years.
Cosmetically this bass is in rough shape with dents, scratches, and missing clear coat all over. But the best basses are the ones that get played and end up looking like this. I have no idea what happened with the strap button on the upper horn but I can assure you that I installed the new Dunlop strap locks using the toothpick trick, and having thrown this bass around on stage they are rock solid and not coming out.
The frets are pretty worn, I think there's enough to do a fret level still but I didn't have a problem using it as is. Your opinion/interpretation of that may vary.
Please message me with any questions.
Thank you

item.title: Yamaha TBRX174 4-String Bass Guitar - Metallic Red - 2021 — $180
item.description:
$180 · Very Good · Music 2 U 2 Day - Instruments & More

YAMAHA TRBX174 4-STRING BASS GUITAR - RED METALLIC

The Yamaha TRBX174 Bass Guitar is an outstanding value for the modern bassist. The TRBX series is one of Yamaha's most popular basses, and for good reason. This cool-looking, great-sounding bass gives you a comfortable Yamaha body shape and a fast-action bolt-on maple neck with a smooth-playing sonokeling fingerboard. You get strong, punchy tone from the P/J arrangement of split-coil/single-coil pickups. Factor in the solid hardware and a range of great finishes, and you've got an eye-catching and ear-catching bass with the Yamaha TRBX174. 


This Listing Also Includes The Following:

  • CUSTOM SETUP WITH LA  BELLA  FLAT WOUND STRINGS .045-.105 
  • MEDIUM SEMI HARD / SOFT USED  CASE

The YAMAHA RED METALLIC TRBX174 BASS is in VERY GOOD CONDITION with a few scratches or finish dings, but nothing that affects the playability or function of the guitar. Just recently had the guitar set up for ease of playability along with a fresh set of La Bella flat wound strings. The used semi hard/soft bag has a taped repair spot in the upper inside which seems to be holding well. This listing includes only the items stated as included in the description and pictured; the various cabinets and guitar stands pictured are for display only and not included in the sale. All sales are final, sold as is per our posted seller policies, no returns. SHIPPING to the Continental USA, only. Please check our excellent feedback especially as it speaks to our principles and quality of care. Thank you for your interest.I


YAMAHA TRBX174 4-STRING BASS GUITAR AT A GLANCE:


COMFORTABLE BODY WITH PROGRESSIVE STYLING

One look at the Yamaha TRBX174 electric bass, and you know it means business. A deep cutaway gives you clean access to the higher registers for soloing, while the pronounced upper bout provides balance (and looks cool). You're going to love the way the TRBX174 looks and feels!


P/J PICKUP ARRANGEMENT FOR A UNIVERSE OF GREAT BASS TONES

The Yamaha TRBX174 sports a classic pickup layout: a split-coil in the middle position and a single-coil at the bridge. The Precision-style split-coil serves up the beef, giving you solid, deep fundamentals. the Jazz-style single delivers the growl, with strong mids and highs (particularly if you're strung up with round-wounds). How you combine the pickups is up to you, but one thing's for sure - you've got tons of tonal options!


YAMAHA QUALITY, THROUGH AND THROUGH

The Yamaha TRBX174 bass is covered by the company's Limited Lifetime Warranty. Yamaha has been making world-class instruments for over a century, and they're supremely confident of the quality of the materials and workmanship that goes into their products. You can rest easy that you've made a solid decision in purchasing the Yamaha TRBX174 electric bass guitar!


Yamaha TRBX174 4-string Bass Guitar Features great sound, playability, and value! 

  • Fast-action maple neck and sonokeling fingerboard
  • Comfortable alder body with progressive styling
  • P/J pickup arrangement gives you a universe of great bass tones
  • A great-sounding and playing bass

item.title: MTD Norm Stockton Signature Saratoga 5 String Bass, Satin Blue Burst — $2,099.99
item.description:
$2,099.99 · Brand New · Ernie Williamson Music

Located at our Corporate Offices at 1902 E Meadowmere St, Springfield, MO

MTD Kingston Norm Stockton Signature Saratoga Bass Guitar

A pillar of the bass community, Norm Stockton has been part of the MTD family since 1997. Between touring, sessions and countless clinics, he has distinguished himself as a brilliant player, teacher, and ambassador for the instrument.

The Kingston Norm Stockton Signature Saratoga is a natural evolution in our relationship. MTD introduced the Norm Stockton USA Signature in 2013. The Kingston version is an extension of that initial collaboration and features a familiar aesthetic to go with appointments not found on other Kingston instruments.

I had high expectations for the Kingston NS, and it absolutely blew them away! Gorgeous looks, spectacular playability, and TONE for days. Everyone who's played it has been floored.

-Norm Stockton

Among those appointments are the custom USA Bartolini pickups and electronics package that deliver a tonal punch that must be experienced. The electronics feature active/passive switching and a custom mid-shift switch to select between 250hZ/450hZ (same frequencies as the USA version NS), making this instrument tonally unique among our lineup. Combining these electronics with the carbon reinforced maple neck, and a beautiful alder and maple body makes for a bass that is both incredibly versatile and thoroughly inspiring.

item.title: 2004 Spector Rebop 5 Fretless — $1,800
item.description:
$1,800 · Very Good · Nick K's Bass Gear

Incredibly rare fretless Spector Rebop 5 from 2004. This is my second time owning this bass but forced to sell for financial reasons.
Fingerboard has been plek'd and glowing side dots installed. I also replaced the bridge with a solid brass black Spector 5 bridge to fix the balance of the bass, and sourced a NOS set of Rebop tuners from Europe to replace two original tuners that were damaged. Pickups and preamp replaced with a Bartolini 72M45 humbucker set and a 2 band Bartolini preamp with active/passive push pull.
Everything else is original and I believe these mods make it an objectively better bass than stock. All replaced stock parts included.
Nothing much to say cosmetically, I just applied howards feed/wax on the body. Some dings and scratches throughout. Truss rod works and the 3pc maple neck is just beyond stable. Tuned E-C with super light chromes.
Please message me with questions. Comes with the pictured strap and original case.
Thanks

item.title: Jackson 291-7699-893 Adam Blackstone Gladys Pro Series 5-String Bass Guitar - Black Stone — $999.99
item.description:
$999.99 · Brand New · ProAudioLand

With massive success on TV and radio, Adam Blackstone has served as musical director for some of the biggest names in the music industry. An Emmy award-winning Music Director and Grammy nominated writer; Adam is one of the top musical masterminds in today’s live show events.

The Adam Blackstone "Gladys" Jackson Pro Series Signature Concert™ Bass, is a modern take on a legendary Jackson® shape. Carefully designed with features to meet the needs of the artist. The model’s name is a celebration to Adam’s grandmother: Mrs. Gladys Jackson.

This 34”-scale bass pairs a resonant poplar body and graphite-reinforced bolt-on neck design to generate formidable sustain, while the custom neck profile and 9”– 16” compound radius maple fingerboard and 21 jumbo frets make for super comfortable playability.

The heart of this five-string bass has custom Jackson BBE J-style pickups, voiced to the artist specifications, paired with an active 3-band EQ circuit to dial in that perfect tone. A Jackson Hi-Mass bridge enhances note attack and sustain without altering tone while the open-gear tuners combine for stellar tuning stability with improved note punch and sustain.

The Adam Blackstone "Gladys" Jackson Pro Series Signature Concert bass ups the ante in the style realm with all-new vivid black stone finish, creme pickguard, black block inlays, a mixture of black and gold hardware, dome-style control knobs, Jackson 4-and-one color matched paddle headstock and a gig bag. Highly affordable, this is the perfect bass for the musician who requires nothing less than the latest in high-performance bass technology.

 

Features

  • Poplar body
  • Bolt-on maple neck with graphite reinforcement
  • 9"-16" compound radius maple fingerboard with black block inlays
  • Custom voiced Jackson® BBE J-style pickups
  • 34" scale length
  • 21 jumbo frets
  • Three-band EQ
  • Four-and-one Jackson paddle headstock
  • Jackson Hi-Mass bridge
  • Open-gear tuners
  • Gig bag included

$6,999 · Excellent · Guitar Chimp

For Sale: 2026 Rickenbacker 4003 Noir Limited Edition – Satin Black | 1 of 20 Produced | OHSC

Up for sale is an exceptionally rare 2026 Rickenbacker 4003 Noir Limited Edition in Satin Black, complete with its original Rickenbacker hard-shell case.

Produced in an ultra-limited run of only 20 basses worldwide, the 4003 Noir is one of the rarest modern-production Rickenbackers ever offered. Taking the iconic 4003 platform and giving it a stealth-inspired blackout treatment, the Noir features a satin black finish, black hardware, black pickguard, Macassar ebony fingerboard, checkerboard binding, and unique bullseye inlays that set it apart from any standard production model.

Combining all of the classic Rickenbacker tone and construction with an undeniably striking visual package, the Noir is equal parts player's instrument and collector's piece.

Condition

Excellent Condition – 9.5/10

  • Purchased new from the factory
  • One small ding, otherwise mint
  • No notable wear
  • No modifications
  • Collector-grade example

The bass is 100% original and includes its original Rickenbacker hard-shell case.

There are no cracks, repairs, or structural issues. The neck is straight, the frets are perfect, and the bass plays flawlessly up and down the neck.

Specifications

  • Model: Rickenbacker 4003 Noir Limited Edition
  • Year: 2026
  • Production: 1 of Only 20 Produced Worldwide
  • Serial Number: 26 16793
  • Finish: Satin Black
  • Body: Solid Maple
  • Neck: Maple/Walnut Neck-Through Construction
  • Fingerboard: Macassar Ebony
  • Fingerboard Binding: Black
  • Inlays: Black & White Bullseye Inlays
  • Scale Length: 33.25"
  • Frets: 20
  • Nut Width: 1.70"
  • Neck Depth: .82" at the 1st Fret
  • Neck Depth: .81" at the 12th Fret
  • Pickups: Dual Original Rickenbacker Hi-Gain Single-Coils
  • Controls: Volume, Volume, Tone, Tone
  • Switching: 3-Way Pickup Selector
  • Vintage Tone Push/Pull Circuit
  • Outputs: Standard Mono & Rick-O-Sound Stereo Outputs
  • Hardware: Satin Black
  • Pickguard: Black
  • Binding: Checkerboard
  • Weight: 9 lbs 6 oz
  • Case: Original Rickenbacker Hard-Shell Case

Electronics & Features

The Noir retains everything players love about the modern 4003 platform while introducing one of the most visually striking packages Rickenbacker has ever produced.

The dual Hi-Gain pickups deliver the unmistakable Rickenbacker sound—tight lows, aggressive mids, and piano-like clarity that cuts effortlessly through a mix.

The push/pull vintage tone selector allows players to access classic vintage-spec tones while still retaining the full output and punch of the modern circuit.

Visually, the Noir is simply stunning. The satin black finish, black hardware, checkerboard binding, ebony fingerboard, and custom bullseye inlays create an unmistakable aesthetic that looks both modern and unmistakably Rickenbacker.

Tone & Feel

This bass delivers everything you'd expect from a great Rickenbacker.

The neck-through maple construction provides incredible sustain and articulation, while the Hi-Gain pickups produce the signature growl, attack, and clarity that have made the 4003 a favorite among players for decades.

The Macassar ebony fingerboard adds a smooth, fast feel and contributes to the bass's articulate response and note definition.

At 9 lbs 10 oz, it has the substantial feel many players prefer from a classic Rickenbacker while remaining well-balanced and comfortable.

Transparency & Photos

As with all Guitar Chimp listings, detailed photos are provided of the actual instrument. At the end of the photo set, you'll find close-up images taken under direct lighting to highlight any wear.

We don't just describe the condition—we show it in detail so there are no surprises.

Many customers tell us our instruments often arrive in better condition than expected.

Why Buy From Guitar Chimp?

With over 18 years of experience, Guitar Chimp is trusted by players and collectors worldwide for high-quality, player-ready instruments.

Every bass is thoroughly inspected and professionally set up by our in-house luthier.

We are experts at shipping and have safely shipped thousands of guitars and basses all over the world. Every instrument is professionally packed, fully insured, and shipped with signature confirmation.

📞 Call/Text

💬 Message anytime — always happy to help!

Due to multiple requests, we developed the Brand-New version of our famous Woodcraft Electric Guitars AmpMaster 4 string Bass 30" Short Scale, Balanced model B. Master More bass - the lightest bass made from few pcs. of Amur Velvet Ash, Hard Rock Maple Neck with Vintage style Dual Action Truss Rod system and an Extra Neck Super 8 Pickup

🏷️ PRODUCT PAGE
B. Master Bass – Balanced Master Edition

Master the Mood. Own the Groove.

When raw power meets handcrafted tone, the result is 

the B. Master “Balanced Master” Edition — a short-scale, 4-string electric bass built for players who don’t just hold down the bottom end — they own it.

Featuring ultra-lightweight construction, AlBridge hardware, and Noise Hum-canceling pickups, the Balanced Master Bass delivers punch, grit, and rock-solid sustain with every note.

  • Custom short-scale Slim neck for speed and comfort
  • AlBridge Duralumin adjustable bridge with Pure Bell Bronze saddles + precision light weight tuners
  • Noise Hum dual-coil pickups for clean or dirty tone, one is Super 8 in Classic place for Musicmaster and another in Neck position Super 8 MoreStang Bass pickup (Split Coil Mustang bass style, P bass sound)
  • Premium lightweight tonewood
  • Available in Satin Black, Sienna Burst, Sea Foam Green or Tobacco Burst Custom colors
    🔥 Whether you're holding down the groove or stepping up with a solo, the B. Master Bass is your weapon of choice. Define the Bottom. Command the Band.  Where the Lines Begin and Never End.

Spec sheet:

TUSQ NUT: The nut is one of the most important parts of the bass that influences the performance, playability, and tone of the instrument. Depending on the quality of the material, the nut can either improve or degrade the sound. Although the TUSQ nut is more costly and harder to work with, it is considered to deliver more balanced, clearer and smoother tones than brass, corian or other materials.

ACCURATE AND STABLE TUNING: This bass comes with GOTOH style light weight tuners. Developed with accurate gear ratios, the machine heads are very reliable in tuning,

Albridge parts hand wound Super 8 MusicMaster size Split Coil pickups, dual poled noise free, NO 60 cycle Hum.

Custom wiring CTS pots with filter capacitor, cavity shielded

Neck plate 6 holes Duralumin, light

BRIDGE: This bass comes with an ALBRIDGE parts Custom Light Weight Duralumin bridge, Air space grade with Bell Bronze saddles and extra-hard tension saddle springs to eliminate annoying parasitic rattles/vibrations coming from other types of bridges. String space 18mm.

In Stock Now

Colors available Sienna Burst, Satin Black, Tobacco Burst, Sea Foam Green.

Ampmaster neck: Nut size 38.1mm, at 20th fret 60mm

Width under 1st fret 20mm, 12th fret 22.5mm

Fretboard Radius 12”

Fret’s width 2.8mm (0.11”)

Bass Overall length is 40 3/4 in. (1035 mm.), 12 1/4 in. (31.1 cm.) wide at lower bout, 

and 1 1/2 in. (3.8 cm.) in depth, measured at the side of the rim. Scale length is 30 in. (762 mm.).

item.title: Ibanez Ibanez GSR200BL Bass Guitar 2023 - Natural — $199.99
item.description:
$199.99 · Very Good · TheGearBB

Ibanez GIO GSR200BL Left-Handed 4-String Electric Bass - Walnut Flat - Excellent

Item Description:

Up for sale is a fantastic, highly comfortable Ibanez GIO GSR200BL Left-Handed 4-String Electric Bass in a beautiful Walnut Flat (WNF) satin finish.

Finding a high-quality, comfortable left-handed bass that doesn't break the bank can be a challenge, but the Ibanez Soundgear series is legendary for a reason. This bass features a compact, sleek body design and a super-slim neck profile that makes it an absolute joy to play, whether you are gigging all night, tracking lines in a home studio, or just starting out.

Versatile Tonal Options & Active Bass Boost

This model is equipped with a versatile Dynamix PJ pickup configuration, pairing a punchy split-coil neck pickup with a bright, articulate single-coil bridge pickup.

Best of all, it features the built-in Ibanez Phat II EQ active bass boost circuit. With a simple turn of the knob, you can dial in extra low-end power, girth, and modern thunder without losing note definition.

Condition & Playability:

  • Cosmetic Condition: Excellent condition. The satin Walnut Flat finish is clean and looks beautiful. It has been lightly used in a smoke-free environment. There are no major dings, deep scratches, or structural blemishes—just minor, honest signs of handling from light use.
  • Neck, Frets & Setup: The signature slim maple neck is perfectly straight, and the fretboard is clean with virtually zero fret wear. The action is set low and fast, playing smoothly across all 22 medium frets without buzzing.
  • Hardware & Electronics: The heavy-duty black B10 bridge and die-cast tuners hold rock-solid stability. All electronics are 100% functional; the dual volume knobs, master tone, and Phat II EQ dial turn smoothly without any static or scratchiness. (Requires a standard 9V battery for the active EQ circuit).

Specifications:

  • Model: GSR200BL-WNF (Left-Handed)
  • Finish: Walnut Flat (Satin Wood Grain)
  • Neck: Slim 1-Piece Maple (GSR4 profile)
  • Scale Length: 34" (Full Scale)
  • Fretboard: 22 Medium Frets with white dot inlays
  • Bridge: Accu-cast B10 (19mm string spacing)
  • Pickups: Dynamix P (Neck) & Dynamix J (Bridge) - Passive
  • Electronics: Active Phat II EQ Bass Boost
  • Controls: 2 Volume, 1 Tone, 1 Phat II EQ Dial
  • Hardware Color: Sleek Black
